findings.message: context_path_bytes map does not support reliable historical per-module aggregation because modules_loaded stores raw stage-relative strings not resolved paths — reconstructing module subset from context_paths requires replaying resolveModulePath which depends on filesystem state
Contract drift: fact-find uses per_module_bytes but analysis switches to context_path_bytes and broadens scope to all context files
Health check consumer would get bloated summary if WorkflowTelemetrySummary is extended with path-level aggregates
Missing schema contract surface: docs/business-os/startup-loop/ideas/lp-do-ideas-telemetry.schema.md needs updating
